summary: Frontend adds path-based public download URL builder (/d/<token>) and updates PublicDownloadPage to auto-trigger download once with loading/success/error UI. Backend adds a migration module and wires migration into main actor, but the diff does not show implementation of 20-character unguessable token generation, reassignment for existing files, or token-index consistency/invalidation behavior required by the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace predictable numeric public download tokens with unique, unguessable 20-character tokens for every file, and invalidate all old numeric tokens so they no longer work (including token->file lookup consistency and clear trap for old tokens).
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo changes are truncated and do not show any token generation logic, enforcing 20-character length, uniqueness/collision handling, or explicit invalidation/trap behavior for old numeric tokens in downloadFile(). migration.mo also does not generate new tokens.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated; no visible token generation/downloadFile changes)
backend/migration.mo (tokens map reset to empty; no token regeneration or metadata update)

missing_requirements.requirement: Regenerate and reassign new 20-character tokens for all existing stored files on upgrade, updating both stored metadata and the token index so previously issued links stop working and new links match regenerated tokens.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/migration.mo initializes a new empty tokens map but does not iterate existing files to assign new 20-character tokens, nor does it update each file’s metadata.publicToken to match a regenerated token index.
evidence: backend/migration.mo (newTokens = Map.empty; files left as old.files; no reassignment logic)

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure existing Copy Link actions (user file list and admin file list) produce working public links that route to PublicDownloadPage (/d/$token) and reliably download.
missing_requirements.reason: A new buildPublicDownloadUrl() helper is added, but the diff summary does not show MyFilesTable/AdminPage (or any copy-link UI) updated to use it; therefore it’s not evidenced that the existing Copy Link actions now produce the corrected /d/<token> links.
evidence: frontend/src/utils/links.ts (added helper, but no shown call sites)
frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions copyable links exist, but no diff showing they were changed)

hallucinated_features.description: State migration that clears the entire token index (tokens map) without regenerating/rebuilding it from file metadata.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requires regenerating and reassigning tokens for existing files and keeping token index consistent with metadata; the diff shows tokens reset to empty with no rebuild, which is an extra/incorrect behavior relative to the requested migration outcome.
